summary: Tightened the chapter's handoff from chapter 17 by leading on the expected naming bell, then sharpened the closing echo that these truths were finally said out loud as the families took the reopened road.
edits: Shifted the opening sentence to begin on the bell so the entry lands directly on the previous chapter's promised morning naming.
Added "out loud" to the final paragraph to carry the spoken-truth motif into the chapter's exit.
